name: Anomalous Crossing ~Shibuya~
short_description: Suddenly, you find yourself standing at an empty ticket gate at Shibuya Station. Exit Shibuya Station, cross the scramble crossing, and head towards Center Street. However, please be careful about any anomalies.
detailed_description:
"Anomalous Crossing ~Shibuya~" is an escape game similar to 'The Exit 8' & 'Platform 8', with the theme of liminal space.
A variety of abnormalities occur, from those that are horror, hard to find to those that affect the entire city, so carefully observe them and aim to escape.

---
Suddenly, you find yourself standing at an empty ticket gate at Shibuya Station.
  • Exit Shibuya Station, cross the scramble crossing, and head towards Center Street.
  • Please check carefully to see if there are any anomalies.
  • Escape from the looping Shibuya by making the right choices.

List of Anomalies

.The list of cleared anomalies can be found in the list.
Please find all the anomalies.

Play time

.30 to 60 minutes.
If you find all the anomalies, it will take more.

About play video distribution

.You are free to distribute your play videos to any individual or corporation.
You do not need to contact the developer, but we ask that you include a link to the Steam page in the summary section or elsewhere.
If you'd like, it would be helpful if you could post your thoughts and reviews on Steam.

How to enjoy

・Enjoy the eerie and desolate atmosphere of Shibuya.
・The direct horror expressions are relatively restrained, so even those who aren't good at horror should enjoy it.
・Not only fear, but also surprises, beauty, stories you've seen elsewhere, and a wealth of other anomalies are waiting for your visit.

3D Sickness Prevention

.We have implemented a feature that prevents the view from swaying up and down as the player moves. It is relatively easy to play even for those who get easily intoxicated.
If you are still prone to motion sickness, please turn on “Center Point Display” in the settings. (A dot will be displayed in the center of the screen to prevent sickness.)

* More than 70 types of anomalies are planned.

--Additional note--

・Respect works *Works that have influenced me. Without these works, this work would not have been created. I would like to once again express my deep respect for ...
"The Exit 8" "Platform 8" by KOTAKE CREATE
"False Dream" by TenkaiGames
"nibansen" by MFC STUDIO
If you enjoyed these works, I think you will also enjoy this one. Please note that this is not related to this work.
・Once you clear an anomaly, the appearance rate will decrease during the same play. In addition, the appearance rate of undiscovered anomalies is set to be high after the second play.
・If you clear all the anomalies, a certain function will be unlocked. After clearing, please check the title screen.

--Requests--

・In order to continue our development activities, we require reviews from everyone. We appreciate your cooperation in posting customer reviews and ratings, even if it is just a simple impression.
・Please let us know what you found interesting, requests for the next version, and if you would like to make something different! We'll be expecting you.
Thank you.

supported_languages: English, Japanese, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
